use_cases: Displaying track information with album art, title, and artist name
Providing playback controls including play, pause, skip forward, and skip backward
Showing audio progress with an interactive progress bar and time display
Visualizing volume levels through animated volume bars
Creating an immersive music listening experience in web applications
ai_summary: A music player card component featuring track information display with album art, artist details, and track title. Includes full playback controls with skip buttons, play/pause toggle, interactive progress bar with handle, animated volume bars visualization, and time indicators. Designed with a minimalist flat aesthetic suitable for media and audio streaming applications across desktop and mobile platforms.
